login.title: Sign In
login.description: Report and track issues in your university community with Dschang's Signal.
login.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your credentials.
login.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
login.quote: A simple way to report and track issues in our university.

register.title: Create Account

register.redirect: You will be redirected to login

register.fullNameMax: Full name must be less than 50 characters
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
